'''Danny McAllister''' (born 21 December 1974) is an Australian former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played for [[Gold Coast Chargers|Gold Coast]] and [[South Sydney Rabbitohs|South Sydney]] in the [[National Rugby League]] (NRL).  He also played for the [[Sheffield Eagles]] and [[Gateshead Thunder (1999)|Gateshead Thunder]] in England.

==Playing career==
A forward, McAllister started his professional rugby league career in England, playing for the [[Sheffield Eagles]] from 1995 to 1997. 

McAllister debuted in the NRL in 1998 at the [[Gold Coast Chargers]] and made 16 first-grade appearance that season, which was the club's last in the competition. 

In 1999, he returned to England to play for Gateshead.<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/rugby-league-leeds-appoint-lance-as-coach-1094975.html|title=Rugby League: Leeds appoint Lance as coach|date=21 May 1999|work=[[The Independent]]|accessdate=30 October 2018}}</ref>

Over the next three years, McAllister competed in the [[Queensland Cup]], for Ipswich and Wynnum-Manly.

Midway through the [[2003 NRL season]], while still with Ipswich, he was recruited into South Sydney's league side, to become the club's 1000th first-grade player.<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.smh.com.au/sport/nrl/massage-sinks-in-for-souths-mr-1000-20030523-gdgt2x.html|title=Massage sinks in for Souths' Mr 1000|date=23 May 2003|work=[[The Sydney Morning Herald]]|accessdate=30 October 2018}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.ssralmanac.com/mobile/players_m/player_mcallister_danny.htm|title=South Sydney Rabbitohs Rugby League Player Report - Danny McAllister|website=www.ssralmanac.com}}</ref>
